vibe: Cinematic, immersive, theatrical. 'A theater with the lights down.' UI gets out of the way to let content shine.

rules: Never use pure white text. Use #EDEDED or #F5F5F5 for primary text.
Always apply tight tracking (tracking-tight) to headings.
Headings use 'Outfit', Body text uses 'Manrope'. Verify via Google Fonts.
Generous Spacing Philosophy: Dashboard padding should be p-8 or p-10 to feel premium.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
No jagged bottoms in bento grids. Use h-full on children.
The Watch Room should be a 100vh flex container. Video takes flex-1 (with relative positioning), Chat sidebar is fixed width (w-80 or w-96).

buttons.primary: bg-[#E50914] text-white hover:bg-[#F40612] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors data-testid
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors data-testid
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors data-testid

video_player.wrapper: relative w-full h-full bg-black flex items-center justify-center group
video_player.controls_overlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex flex-col gap-2
video_player.progress_bar: w-full h-1 bg-white/20 rounded-full cursor-pointer hover:h-2 transition-all duration-200

chat_message.bubble_self: bg-[#E50914]/20 text-[#F5F5F5] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm w-fit self-end border border-[#E50914]/30
chat_message.bubble_other: bg-white/10 text-[#F5F5F5] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm w-fit self-start

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 transition-all placeholder:text-white/30

hero_background.description: Empty cinematic theater with red seats. Use for the landing page hero section background with a heavy black/gradient overlay (bg-black/70 or heavier) to ensure text readability.

dashboard_texture.description: Abstract dark lighting texture. Use as a very low opacity (10%) background image in the admin dashboard for a premium textured feel.

media.icons: lucide-react (Use standard lucide icons for player controls like Play, Pause, Maximize, Settings, Volume, Mic, Video)

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must shift visually. Buttons slightly scale (active:scale-95).
motion_and_interaction.video_controls: Controls overlay must fade out after 3 seconds of mouse inactivity. Fade in immediately on mousemove.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Use subtle fade-ins for route changes.
motion_and_interaction.chat: New messages should slide up (translate-y-2 to 0) and fade in.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use ONLY .js files for React components (JSX), not .tsx files. You are building a React + Tailwind + Vite/FastAPI hybrid_fullstack app.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Apply the 'dark' class to the html/body or root div to enforce dark mode globally. Set global body background to #050505.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Load the Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in the index.html or global CSS.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Build a Custom Video Player component that wraps the HTML5 video element. Do not use default HTML5 controls. Implement custom controls as styled in 'video_player' guidelines.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: The Watch Room layout should completely hide the global Navbar/Footer. It must be an immersive fullscreen experience.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='chat-input').
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use Shadcn components for complex UI like Dropdowns (for Quality/Speed settings), Dialogs (for Invite Link sharing), and Slider (for Volume and Seek).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: WebRTC logic: The host streams the media. Ensure UI clearly shows who the Host is. Only the host should be able to seek or change the video source.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Avoid generic purple/teal gradients. Stick to the cinematic dark void with Crimson/Red accents.
instructions_to_main_agent.10: For the landing page, overlay the hero image with 'bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 via-black/60 to-[#050505]' to blend seamlessly into the dark page body.
